smtlib2:
(declare-fun F (Bool) Bool)
(declare-fun D () Bool)
(declare-fun C () Bool)
(declare-fun B () Bool)
(declare-fun A () Bool)
(assert (F (and A B (or C D))))
policy: To qualify for the enhanced retirement matching program, employees must have completed the mandatory financial planning seminar and must maintain a minimum contribution rate of 6% to their 401(k) account. Additionally, eligibility requires either completion of 5 years of continuous service with the company or attainment of senior management level (Grade 12 or above).

test_cases.scenario: Gabriele Sacco completed the mandatory financial planning seminar last month and currently contributes 8% to his 401(k) account. He has been with Qualcomm for 7 years in a Grade 10 engineering role. His application for the enhanced retirement matching program was approved.

Polina Drozdov attended the required financial planning workshop but only contributes 4% to her retirement account. She recently joined McKinsey & Company and was promoted to senior manager (Grade 13) within her first year. Her application for enhanced matching benefits was denied due to insufficient contribution rate.

Edward Lambright completed the financial planning seminar and maintains a 10% contribution rate to his 401(k). He has worked at AbbVie for 3 years as a Grade 8 research scientist. His application was rejected because he has not yet reached the 5-year service milestone and does not hold senior management status.
